tests.description: registerPlugin stores a plugin and getPluginManifest returns its public surface
tests.action: MU.registerPlugin({id: 'reg-test', name: 'Reg Test', extension: 'rt', export: async (c) => c, import: async (c) => c}, 'Reg Test'); const entry = MU.getPluginManifest().find(m => m.id === 'reg-test'); expect(entry).toBeDefined(); expect(entry.id).toBe('reg-test'); expect(entry.name).toBe('Reg Test'); expect(entry.extension).toBe('rt'); expect(entry.export).toBeUndefined(); expect(entry.import).toBeUndefined()

tests.description: getPluginManifest returns only { id, name, extension } — no function references
